query:
UPDATE inventoryItems SET lastCost = 49.4000, avgCost = 49.6957, costPerUsableUnit = ROUND(49.4000 / (yieldPct/100), 4) WHERE name = 'Salmon';
UPDATE inventoryItems SET purchaseAmount = 1 WHERE name = 'Vanilla Extract';
